home.title: Frontend Developer
home.desc: I build modern, responsive user interfaces, optimizing user experience and performance across devices using React and modern web technologies.

list.title: Portfolio Website
list.description: A personal portfolio built with React and TypeScript, featuring a responsive design for multiple devices. The application supports dark/light mode, multi-language switching, optimized performance, and provides a smooth, modern user experience.

list.title: E-commerce Website
list.description: An e-commerce web application specializing in computer keyboards and mice, built with React and TypeScript, supporting both dark and light modes. The system integrates a chatbox and backend with full CRUD functionality and user role-based access control, ensuring a smooth user experience. Featuring an intuitive interface and fast loading performance, the project is currently under development, aiming to become a modern, flexible, and scalable platform.

about.title: About Me
about.name: Le Hoang Phuc
about.desc1: I am currently a final-year IT student at Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City (IUH), focusing on modern web interface development. I am proficient in ReactJS, TypeScript, and frontend technologies to build responsive and high-performance user interfaces.
about.desc2: I have built my personal portfolio website and am developing a real-world web project. I also participated in team projects, gaining practical experience and improving my frontend development skills.
about.desc3: I have strong self-learning ability, logical thinking, and a proactive mindset. I aim to work in a professional environment to further develop my skills and contribute to real-world products.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: A personal portfolio built with React and TypeScript, featuring a responsive design that adapts to multiple devices. The application supports dark/light mode, flexible internationalization, and is optimized for performance and smooth user experience. The website demonstrates the ability to build modern interfaces and effectively manage frontend architecture.
role: Designed and developed a personal portfolio to showcase projects and technical skills
Built a modern, responsive user interface using React, TypeScript, and CSS
Implemented Dark/Light mode and multi-language support (i18n) to enhance user experience
Optimized performance and UI/UX for smooth and consistent interactions across devices

key_nexus.title: E-commerce Website
key_nexus.description: An e-commerce web application specializing in selling computer keyboards and mice, built with React and TypeScript, featuring support for both dark and light modes. The project integrates a chatbox and backend with CRUD functionalities and user authorization, and is still under development. It offers an intuitive interface, fast loading speed, and an optimized experience for shopping and product management. The project aims to become a modern, flexible, and scalable e-commerce platform for future enhancements.
role: Developed responsive user interfaces using React and TypeScript across multiple devices
Built reusable components to improve scalability and maintainability
Designed and implemented an Admin Dashboard system
Integrated APIs and handled CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Managed application state using Context API and Zustand
Enhanced UI/UX to improve overall user experience
Implemented Dark/Light mode for flexible theming
Optimized performance for smooth data interactions and user experience
